channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ANC-SACP Rift Signals Deepening Strain in South Africa’s Left-Wing Alliance
item.description: April 27, 2026, Freedom Day, exposed a stark contrast between South Africa’s democratic ideals and the current political reality. President Cyril Ramaphosa addressed a nearly empty stadium in the Free...

item.title: Withdrawn AI Policy Highlights Need for Strong Oversight and Public Participation in South Africa
item.description: South Africa’s draft National Artificial Intelligence Policy was withdrawn after it emerged that at least six of its cited sources were fabricated, likely generated by a large language model. Communic...

item.title: Tories propose stricter household benefit cap reforms to curb welfare dependency
item.description: The Conservative Party has unveiled plans to tighten the household benefit cap, aiming to curb welfare dependency and prevent abuse of the system. Under the proposals, households receiving Personal In...

item.title: Living with Anxiety and the Struggle with Alcohol
item.description: Gemma Correll recounts her lifelong struggle with anxiety and depression, tracing her experiences from childhood through adulthood. The extract from her book 'Anxietyland' reveals how she initially tu...

item.title: 10th Infantry Division Enhances Camp Facilities to Support Troops and Reintegration Programs
item.description: The Philippine Army’s 10th Infantry Division (10th ID) recently inaugurated new infrastructure at Camp Gen. Manuel T. Yan Sr. in Mawab, Davao de Oro, marking a significant step in improving operationa...

item.title: President and PM highlight media's role in promoting truth and national unity
item.description: On World Press Freedom Day, observed this year under the theme 'Shaping a Future at Peace', President Asif Ali Zardari and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif praised the vital role of media in promoting tr...

item.title: Grass fire disrupts traffic on central Alberta highway
item.description: A grass fire has forced the closure of a section of a central Alberta highway. The fire, which was reported on May 2, 2026, spread quickly due to dry conditions, and firefighters have been working to ...

item.title: Spirit Airlines ceases operations as rising fuel costs thwart recovery plan
item.description: Spirit Airlines, a U.S.-based discount carrier, ceased operations on May 2 following a sharp increase in jet fuel prices triggered by the ongoing Iran conflict. The airline, which at its peak accounte...

item.title: Two Peel police vehicles crash en route to weapons call in Mississauga, officers injured
item.description: Two Peel Regional Police cruisers were involved in a collision while responding to a weapons-related call in Mississauga, drawing attention to the risks officers face during emergency responses. The i...

item.title: Gbajabiamila endorses Obafemi Hamzat for Lagos 2027 governorship
item.description: For April 2026, the Chief of Staff to the President, Femi Gbajabiamila, give official backing to the Lagos State Deputy Governor, Dr. Obafemi Hamzat, for the 2027 governorship race. This endorsement h...

item.title: Canadian Music Scholarships and School Nutrition Programs Receive Strong Community Support
item.description: In Toronto, The Royal Conservatory of Music hosted its annual fundraiser, The Royal Occasion, on April 22, raising $450,000 to support scholarships, outreach programs, and training opportunities for C...

item.title: England enacts major housing reforms as U.S. housing policy stalls
item.description: England has introduced a landmark housing law, the Renters’ Rights Act, which took effect on May 1, 2026. The legislation aims to protect tenants and improve housing conditions amid rising rents, home...

item.title: VD Savarkar’s grandnephew clarifies historical records in defamation case against Rahul Gandhi
item.description: In a recent hearing at Pune court, Satyaki Savarkar, grandnephew of Hindutva ideologue VD Savarkar, testified in a criminal defamation case against Congress leader Rahul Gandhi. The case concerns alle...

item.title: Glow Pitch Tournament Raises Funds for TeleMiracle 2027
item.description: The inaugural Glow Pitch tournament, a unique event designed to raise funds for TeleMiracle 2027, took place in Regina. The tournament featured teams participating in glow-in-the-dark soccer games, pr...

item.title: Meta acquires ARI to advance humanoid robotics and AI research
item.description: Meta has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence (ARI), a startup focused on developing advanced AI models for humanoid robots, as part of its broader push into robotics and artificial intelligence. Altho...

item.title: Ruto Announces 12% General Wage Increase and 15% Boost for Farm Workers During Labour Day
item.description: President William Ruto marked this year’s Labour Day celebrations in Vihiga County by announcing a 12% increase in general wages for Kenyan workers, alongside a higher 15% pay rise for those in the ag...

item.title: Boko Haram and ISWAP Intensify Clashes in Sambisa Forest, Heavy Losses Reported
item.description: Fresh tori from Borno State dey show say wahala between Boko Haram and ISWAP don dey increase as both sides dey fight for control of Sambisa Forest and nearby areas. Sources talk say the fights don de...

item.title: Sajid Sadpara successfully climbs Mount Makalu without supplemental oxygen
item.description: Pakistani mountaineer Sajid Ali Sadpara has achieved a remarkable feat by summiting Mount Makalu, the fifth-highest mountain in the world at 8,485 meters, without supplemental oxygen. This climb marks...

item.title: Ruto Defends Government Infrastructure Projects Against Sifuna's Criticism
item.description: During Labour Day celebrations in Vihiga County, President William Ruto responded strongly to criticisms from Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna, who had labelled the government's infrastructure initiatives...

item.title: Graduate Overwhelmed with Emotion as Boyfriend Proposes at Graduation Ceremony
item.description: A university graduate had an unforgettable graduation day when her boyfriend proposed to her in front of fellow students and guests. The emotional moment unfolded at Copperbelt University's annual gra...
